title: Run BTS! 2.0 Episode 1 Premieres — First Full-Group Variety Content Since 2022
detail: Run BTS! 2.0 Episode 1 'The Reunion: Back to the Start' premieres on April 7, 2026 at 9PM KST on the official Bangtan TV YouTube channel and Weverse — free to all viewers globally. The 45-minute special was filmed at a historic Seoul location echoing the show's first 2015 episode and features a 'Telepathy Test' to see if the members still share the same 'one soul' after years of military service. The show had gone on extended hiatus in 2023 ahead of the members' enlistments. The premiere represents the first full-group variety content since 2022 and comes just two days before the Arirang World Tour opening, building fan anticipation globally.

title: ARMY Member Presale Opens for Arirang World Tour Latin America Dates
detail: The ARMY Membership (Global) presale for the Arirang World Tour Latin America dates opened on April 7, 2026 at designated local times, with selected shows continuing on April 8. Fans who registered on Weverse by the April 2 deadline were eligible to purchase up to 4 tickets per event using their 9-digit ARMY Membership number. Latin American dates span Brazil, Argentina, Mexico, Colombia, Chile, and Peru — the most extensive Latin American tour run in BTS history. General public ticket sales are set for April 10 at btsworldtourofficial.com. The presale followed heavy demand that drove Goyang resale prices on StubHub to as high as 40x face value ahead of the tour's April 9 opening.
